benchmark.source: Open Targets L2G gold standard (Mountjoy 2021) x OT Platform 26.06 coloc

interpretation: Distance is a strong baseline and beats naive E2G locus nomination in aggregate (OOD use); E2G value is COMPLEMENTARY — 39 effectors recovered that distance misses (18 coloc-silent, incl GLP1R/MYC/SNCA/VDR/PTHLH/MAPK8), plus a regulatory SIGN call (repressive AUROC 0.605) that neither coloc nor distance provides.
cate: per-token CNN->cross-attention model, 6.4M params, training in progress at report time (epoch 1, loss 1.68->1.30)
